<!-- AUTO-GENERATED BY CONCERT v0.1.0 — DO NOT EDIT. This file is managed by Concert and will be overwritten on `concert update`. -->

# concert:archive

Archive a completed mission — remove mission folder and reset state.

## Instructions

1. Read `docs/concert/state.json`.
2. Verify the mission is complete (all pipeline stages accepted, execution complete or verified).
   - If not complete: output error — "Mission is still in progress. Complete or verify before archiving."
3. Read `mission_path` from state.json to identify the mission folder to delete.
4. Delete the mission folder (e.g., `docs/concert/missions/2026-03-26-feature-name/`).
5. Reset `docs/concert/state.json` to `{}`.
6. Commit both changes: `chore(concert): archive mission — <mission name>`
7. Output summary:

```
📦 Mission archived: <mission name>
   Deleted: <mission_path>
   State reset: docs/concert/state.json

   Mission history is preserved in git log.
   Project specs (docs/concert/*-SPEC.md) are unchanged.

📋 Next steps:
  → Start a new mission:  /concert:init
```
